title: Weapons Effect
description: Variety of 3D weapons with effects, immunities and abilities, to increased the combat experience
body:
## **Weapons Effect**
Introduces a variety of unique weapons with a variety of effect and some abilities, making battles more engaging and allows players to explore different combat styles. Each weapon features improved visuals 3D, making them stand out. Increases immersion and makes using each weapon a more memorable experience. Powerful weapons to keep the player entertain.

## **What You’ll Find**
Powerful weapons with effects and immunities.
Detailed 3D models.
Powerful abilities.
